mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (id, user_id, status, total_amount, currency, note, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{totalAmount}, #{currency}, #{note}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, status, total_amount, currency, note, sqs_message_id, created_at, updated_at FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, user_id, status, total_amount, currency, note, sqs_message_id, created_at, updated_at FROM orders WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at ASC
